data.body:
In dementia care, 

practitioners avoid using logic & reason because the disease physically damages the parts of the brain responsible for these functions. 

Attempting to use "common sense" or logic 

often leads to frustration, anxiety, & increased agitation 
for both the caregiver & the patient.
